entries.summary: Completed Full Application Audit of Quest Forge across 5 phases. Audited 263 source files, 42 routes, 22 API routes, 15 DB tables. Compiled 13 findings (2 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 2 LOW, 7 INFO). Verified build passes, all 144 tests pass, auth flows correct, no major security holes.
top_rejection_reasons: F-004 enum drift finding was false positive — enums already up to date
F-002 duplicate ghost table finding not removed after merge
Summary severity/category counts mismatched actual findings
lessons_learned: Reviewer gate iterations caught 3 inaccuracies in audit findings — iterative QA is valuable even for analysis tasks
Database schema drift (3 ghost tables, 1 missing table) is the highest-priority finding — types need regeneration
All builds, lint, type-check, and tests pass — project infrastructure is solid
Gate system is designed for code-change tasks — analysis-only plans need per-task gate accommodations
Hidden coupling analysis (dark matter) identified shared architecture across game components not visible via imports
